spec_match.rationale: The demo now probes the current drawElementImage() name first, accepts earlier prototype names only as compatibility aliases, and labels fallback simulation when no native HTML-in-canvas method is exposed.

interactive.rationale: Users can select source cards, change thumbnail size, adjust source scale, force fallback rendering, render the canvas, and download the PNG.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page lede and instructions now match the concrete thumbnail workflow and state that unsupported browsers use an explicit simulation.

edge_cases.rationale: The forced fallback checkbox and capability readout expose the unsupported-origin-trial path as a distinct, testable state.

references.rationale: A labelled references section includes chromestatus.com/feature/5172548013916160 and the WHATWG HTML pull request.

design_system.rationale: The inline CSS and canvas fallback use repository CSS variables, and the local button hover background override also sets color.

summary: Thumbnail Generator now clears the major interactivity finding with live controls, runtime API detection, an explicit fallback mode, labelled references, and design-system-safe colors.
